arts.ttl: Brighton make €23m verbal offer for player – ‘Decided to launch’ transfer effort
arts.sum: Brighton and Hove Albion have made a verbal offer to Strasbourg for midfielder Habib Diarra to move this month. That’s according to L’Equipe, who report that Brighton have stepped forward to try and sign the young midfielder.
